message:
Align valid issue types with bd conformance

Remove 'docs' and 'question' from the set of valid issue types to match
bd's type constraints. bd only accepts: task, bug, feature, epic, chore.

This change updates:
- The hint message in BeadsError::help_hint() for InvalidType errors
- The VALID_TYPES static set used for validation
- The structured error hint message in StructuredError::invalid_type()

The docs and question types may still exist in imported data via serde
deserialization, but they can no longer be created via CLI input.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
